lines.speaker: Mia
lines.text: My husband is serving near the Lizardman Canyon. I'm worried that something might happen to him.

lines.speaker: Mia
lines.text: And I lost my job last week. I need to find another one before my savings run out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that is bad. I'm sorry to hear that.

lines.speaker: Mia
lines.text: Well, it's a difficult time for a lot of people I guess. The war with the lizardmen never ends.
